name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐜..."     |
where you and Gojo 𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘶𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 hate each other.



____________________

i don't know if there's any real enemies to lovers Gojo bots out there... so i decided to make one myself!

i wanted a bot where like you both just really hated each other. theres absolutely no secret crush or love. I have not programmed this into the bot.

honestly, im interested to see if people can make him fall in love with you 😭 

alsooo-- people have been asking for c.ai versions of my bots and so i have finally done it! i had to create an acc on there, but i've done it and uploaded two bots so far. i'll upload more each day since it doesn't take that long.

please check it out [here](https://character.ai/profile/stormiedeen) if you're interested! i plan to put all bots on there (might have to make sfw versions of my nsfw bots though cause of that nsfw block :/)

anyways, i'll announce on here when new bots have been uploaded!
